inputs.preview_markdown: ❌ Failed to start SSH. Is it installed?
inputs.preview_text: ❌ Failed to start SSH. Is it installed?

inputs.expression:
import subprocess

# Check if SSH is installed
which = subprocess.run(['which', 'sshd'], capture_output=True)
if which.returncode != 0:
    # Install OpenSSH server
    subprocess.run(['apt-get', 'update'], capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['apt-get', 'install', '-y', 'openssh-server'], capture_output=True)
    out1 = "✅ OpenSSH server installed"
else:
    out1 = "✅ SSH is already installed"
